name: Chocolate Poundcake No.2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, salt, and sugar.
2. Add margarine, milk, vanilla. Beat on medium speed, for about 2 minutes to blend the ingredients.
3. Add eggs and melted chocolate, beating another 2 to 3 minutes to blend.
4. Turn batter into a greased 3 1/2-inch deep tube pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and cool in the pan for 15 minutes.
7. Invert the pan and carefully remove the cake.
8. Serve warm or cool, dusted with powdered sugar if desired. Makes approximately 12 servings.
